diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point that exports Hono class with default router support.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper exporting HonoBase and router implementations, sets default routers based on export order.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Core Hono base class providing request handling, routing, middleware composition, and context.
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, Compose, Request, Response, match, handle, basePath, clone, use.
+- Simple note: Abstract base class implementing HTTP handling; accepts custom router in constructor; composes middleware arrays.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory index.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports PatternRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router using URL pattern matching with regex compilation at route registration time.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, Params, Result, Router, match, preprocessedRoutes, exec, path.match.
+- Simple note: Pre-compiles routes to regex during initialization; stores handlers; matches paths at request time.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory index.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports LinearRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router using string-based linear route matching with wildcard support.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, Router, Route, Params, Result, match, routes, indexOf, wildcards, parameter extraction.
+- Simple note: Scans route arrays linearly at match time; supports * wildcard and :param with lookahead regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory index.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter build functions.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router building trie structure and compiling it to regex at initialization.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Trie, Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, buildAndExportAllMatchers, buildRegExp, buildAllMatchers.
+- Simple note: Two-phase: build trie from routes, compile to regex; exports matchers per HTTP method for fast lookup.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines matcher types and match function using pre-built regex matchers.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, match, emptyParam, buildAllMatchers.
+- Simple note: Matchers are [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap][]; match function builds index time matchers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Optimizer class for prepared route matching; reuses pre-built matchers.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, RelocateMap RegExpRouter.
+- Simple note: Builds relocateMap at setup time for O(1) route selection during matching.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class representing trie structure with children, methods, and patterns.
+- Names noticed: Node, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, Context, getPattern, splitRoutingPath, addRoute, handle.
+- Simple note: Trie node stores method-based handler sets with pattern matching for dynamic segments.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class for organizing routes into tree structure.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ParamAssocArray, buildRegExp.
+- Simple note: Converts route trie into compiled regex patterns with parameter index mappings.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory index.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports SmartRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router that routes methods or paths dynamically to specialized routers.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, Result, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, routers, routes, match.
+- Simple note: Routes GET/HEAD to path-based router, POST/OPTIONS/PATCH to method-based router; lazy router building.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Router factory index.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Re-exports TrieRouter from router.ts.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Router using trie-based path matching.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Result, Router, Node, checkOptionalParameter, search, match, splitPath.
+- Simple note: Trie of path segments; walks trie on request; handles trailing slashes and optional parameters.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for Node class trie behavior.
+- Names noticed: Node, search, get, post, put, delete, parameters, static, dynamic routes, childKeys.
+- Simple note: Test suite for trie node search with various route/parameter configurations.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, match, GET, wildcard, param.
+- Simple note: Tests pattern matching with wildcards and parameters; uses common case test harness.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, match, wildcard, param, index.
+- Simple note: Tests linear matching with index-based substring search and lookahead regex.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, match, buildAndExportAllMatchers, STATIC, WILDCARD, regex param, capture indices.
+- Simple note: Tests trie-to-regex compilation with parameter capture and method matching.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Tests dynamic router routing based on method and path.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, search, match.
+- Simple note: TrieRouter matches only GET method; no support for non-GET operations.
+
+## src/router/common.case
